feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to Connect Eclipse with Git or abapGit and Push ABAP Code to GitHub for ABAP Cloud project
entry.content:
I'm working on an ABAP development project and would like to integrate version control using GitHub.

I’m specifically looking to push ABAP code to GitHub directly from Eclipse using either Git or the abapGit plugin.

What I've done so far:

  • Installed Egit plugin in Eclipse via the Marketplace.

  • Installed the abapGit plugin in Eclipse following the SAP Developers guide:
    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-install-abapgit-plugin.html

I'm trying to understand:

  • Can I push ABAP code directly from Eclipse ADT to GitHub?

  • If yes, what are the exact steps to do this using either Git or abapGit in Eclipse?

  • If not, what is the recommended way to use GitHub for ABAP version control (especially in ABAP cloud  project)?

entry.title: Additional Binding annotation not working for consumption valuehepdefinition
entry.content:
I am trying to use a search help with values being filtered on an input local field value.

 

@ui.selectionField: [{position: 20}]

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 20, label: 'Version' }]

@ui.identification: [{ position: 20, label: 'Version' }]

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [

{ entity:{ element: 'Version',

name: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH' } },

 

{ additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'Aadhar',

element: 'AadharID',

usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT }] }

]

Version;

 

------

 

The Search Help CDS looks like as below-

 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

serviceQuality: #X,

sizeCategory: #S,

dataClass: #MIXED

}

 

@search.searchable: true

define view entity ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH as select distinct from zpsb_item

{

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Aadhar ID'

key aadhar as AadharID,

 

@search.defaultSearchElement: true

@search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.9

@EndUserText.label: 'Version of the ID'

Key version as Version

}

 

group by

aadhar,

version

-------

I am checking the SAP documentation and I believe I have done it right but stil

the value is not filtered. I need help please. I am finding this ABAP RAP trial

totally junk, sometimes despite the right code some feature won't work then wait

next day it starts working. This is science right not some dark magic. Why should

it behave like this? Please help me with this annotation and if I am doing wrong.

entry.title: Instance Memory in ABAP for Cloud Development
entry.content:
I have not been able to find a way to retain Static Class attributes in instance memory between SAPUI5 apps and the ABAP backend. We're currently on a S/4 HANA on-premise 2023 FSP 02 system. On each call to the ABAP backend from SAPUI5, all of my static class attributes are cleared. Nothing is kept in ABAP memory between calls the ABAP backend from my UI5 apps. 

How can we retain ABAP class instances in memory while re-designing our UI to run on SAPUI5? I hope that I am missing a setting to keep an ABAP internal session memory alive. If not, this is a really big issue for partners and customers that cannot leverage there instanciated instances without having to rebuild from the DB on every call to the ABAP Server. SAPUI5 apps need to be able to leverage instantiated classes in the ABAP server.

oData services have become the primary bridge between frontend and backend apps. However, OData can't support ABAP object references, so we need to get a little more creative on how to make the two technologies work together:

Attempt 1 - Custom CDS entities + ABAP data store. Here we set up a data store as a singleon to try to take advantage of static attribute - FAILED

class ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE definition
  public
  final
  create public .

public section.

  class-methods GET_OBJECT
    returning
      value(RO_DATA_STORE) type ref to ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE .
  methods GET_FOO_OBJECT
    returning
      value(RO_FOO) type ref to ZCL_FOO.
  methods SET_FOO_OBJECT
    importing
      !IO_FOO type ref to ZCL_FOO .
  METHODS get_count
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rv_count) TYPE int4.
    METHODS set_count
      IMPORTING
        iv_count TYPE int4.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
private section.

  class-data MO_DATA_STORE type ref to ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE .
  DATA MO_FOO type ref to ZCL_FOO .
  DATA mv_count TYPE int4.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_object.
    IF zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store IS NOT BOUND.
      CREATE OBJECT zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store.
    ENDIF.
    ro_data_store = zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_count.
    rv_count = mv_count.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD set_count.
    mv_count = iv_count.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD GET_FOO_OBJECT.
    ro_foo = mo_foo.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD SET_FOO_OBJECT.
    mo_foo = io_foo.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
    TRY.
        DATA(lo_data_store) = zcl_le_data_store=>get_object(  ).
        DATA(lv_count) = lo_data_store->get_count(  ).
        lv_count += 1.
        lo_data_store->set_count( lv_count ).

        "Required calls for if_rap_query_provider interface usage
        DATA(lv_top)     = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
        DATA(lv_skip)    = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
        DATA(lt_fields)  = io_request->get_requested_elements( ).
        DATA(lt_sort)    = io_request->get_sort_elements( ).

        DATA(lt_filter_conds) = io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_ranges( ). "       get_filter_conditions( ).
        DATA lt_data TYPE ty_web_api_t.
        io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_data ) ).
        io_response->set_data( lt_data ).

      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(exception).
        DATA(exception_message) = cl_message_helper=>get_latest_t100_exception( exception )->if_message~get_longtext( ).
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.

The get data store method is returning an unbound instance on each call to if_rap_query_provider.

 

Attempt 2 - ABAP Push Channels - FAILED

I extended Gregor's ABAP push channel example to allow PCP messaging between the SAPUI5 app and the ABAP server. Unfortanately,  the data store static attributes do not retain instance memory over ABAP message Channels. The results are the same as attempt #1.

To add insult to injury, when moving this approach from Z-space to a ABAP Cloud, SAP ABAP Messaging Channel Application (t-code SAPC) are not supported in ABAP Cloud. I created another Tech Q&A post on this specific issue here.
  

 

 

CLASS zcl_apc_wsp_ext_zapc_echo DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  INHERITING FROM cl_apc_wsp_ext_stateless_pcp_b
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_message
        REDEFINITION .
    METHODS if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_start
        REDEFINITION .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
private section.

  class-methods PREPARE_MESSAGE_FOR_UI
    importing
      !IV_TEXT type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_TEXT) type STRING .

ENDCLASS.



CLASS ZCL_APC_WSP_EXT_ZAPC_ECHO IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_message.
    DATA: lo_producer TYPE REF TO cl_amc_message_type_pcp.
    DATA: lt_fields          TYPE pcp_fields.
    DATA lt_foo TYPE zcl_foo=>ty_fo_tab.

    TRY.
*       retrieve the text message
        i_message->get_fields( CHANGING c_fields = lt_fields ).
        lo_producer ?= cl_amc_channel_manager=>create_message_producer(
          i_application_id = 'ZAMC_ECHO'
          i_channel_id     = '/echo' ).

        DATA lo_foo TYPE REF TO zcl_foo.

        READ TABLE lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_foo_guid) WITH KEY name = 'foo_guid'.
        IF sy-subrc NE 0.
          "Raise exception
        ENDIF.




        """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
        TRY.
            READ TABLE lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_fields) WITH KEY name = 'operation'.
            DATA(lv_message) = i_message->get_text( ).
            data lo_data_store TYPE REF TO zcl_le_data_store.
            lo_foo = zcl_le_data_store=>get_foo_object( ).
            IF lo_foo IS NOT BOUND.
                "Object memory not working, rebuild from DB :(
                lo_foo = zcl_foo_factory=>find_or_create( ls_doc_guid-value ).
            ENDIF.
            CASE ls_fields-value.
              WHEN 'update_foo'.
                lo_foo->_service( lv_message ).
                "lo_foo->save( i_commit = 'X' ).
              WHEN 'handle_save_and_commit'.
                lo_foo->save( i_commit = 'X' ).
              WHEN OTHERS.

            ENDCASE.

          CATCH cx_root.
            "Raise exception
        ENDTRY.
        """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""


        DATA(lv_text) = prepare_message_for_ui( 'Success' ).
        DATA(lo_msg) = cl_ac_message_type_pcp=>create( ).
        lo_msg->set_text( i_message = lv_text ).
        LOOP AT lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_field).
          IF ls_field-name NP 'pcp-*'.
            lo_msg->set_field( i_name = ls_field-name i_value = ls_field-value ).
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        lo_producer->send( i_message = lo_msg ).
      CATCH cx_ac_message_type_pcp_error INTO DATA(lx_pcp_error).
        MESSAGE lx_pcp_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH cx_amc_error INTO DATA(lx_amc_error).
        MESSAGE lx_amc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH cx_apc_error INTO DATA(lx_apc_error).
        MESSAGE lx_apc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH /coss/cx_api_hub INTO DATA(lx_api_hub).
        MESSAGE lx_api_hub->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_start.
    TRY.
* bind the WebSocket connection to the AMC channel
        DATA(lo_binding) = i_context->get_binding_manager( ).
        lo_binding->bind_amc_message_consumer(
          i_application_id = 'ZAMC_ECHO'
          i_channel_id     = '/echo' ).
      CATCH cx_apc_error INTO DATA(lx_apc_error).
        DATA(lv_message) = lx_apc_error->get_text( ).
        MESSAGE lx_apc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD prepare_message_for_ui.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF t_message,
             text TYPE string,
             user TYPE uname,
             date TYPE timestamp,
           END OF t_message.
    DATA: ls_message TYPE t_message.
    ls_message-text = iv_text.
    ls_message-user = sy-uname.
    GET TIME STAMP FIELD ls_message-date.
    DATA(lo_json_witer) = cl_sxml_string_writer=>create(
                            type = if_sxml=>co_xt_json
                          ).
    CALL TRANSFORMATION id SOURCE ls_message = ls_message
                        RESULT XML lo_json_witer.
    DATA(lv_xstr) = lo_json_witer->get_output( ).
    CALL FUNCTION 'ECATT_CONV_XSTRING_TO_STRING'
      EXPORTING
        im_xstring = lv_xstr
*       im_encoding = 'UTF-8'
      IMPORTING
        ex_string  = rv_text.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

Attempt 3 - ABAP Daemons could be used in combination with any approach that allows communication between SAPUI5 & the ABAP backend and should be able to set and retrieve instanciated objects as a Static Attribute. However, The ABAP dependency (CL_ABAP_DAEMON_EXT_BASE) to make use of ABAP Daemons is also not released for use an ABAP Cloud.

Attempt 4 - ABAP Shared memory to the rescue?  NOPE, This approach can also be used in any combination of SAPUI5 <-> ABAP Cloud communication. Similarly, the ABAP dependencies to make use of this approach are also not released for ABAP Cloud usage (CL_SHM_AREA, if_shm_build_instance & transaction SHMA objects). While this approach does work in non ABAP Cloud, a limitation I came accross is the "cx_shm_external_reference" exception which prevents you from setting an instance ref to shared memory if it has creates references to other objects. For our case of an object with many other nestest instances, this approach is not workable.

After quite some research and failed attempts... getting SAPUI5 and ABAP Cloud to work together is challenging. I think we need something like ABAP Events + SAPUI5's EventBus to communicate or a ABAP Cloud based way to use ABAP Push channels. Currently migrating to clean core with the available tools of our on-prem system feels like trying to fit a square peg into a circlular hole 😪.

ps. I am running my freestyle SAPUI5 apps on Business application studio & deploying it to the ABAP Application server. In both scenerios there is not a clear way to utilize my existing ABAP classes are part of our clean core add-on.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

 

 

 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Read data from the APP screen for editable fields without persisting the data.
entry.content:
Hi, I'm developing RAP UNMANAGED to generate a Fiori Elements app using List Report where I used standard PP CDSs for the order list and its components. In the custom CDS that I read from the Standard CDSs, I created a REASON field to insert a code. After that, the idea is to select the edited line with a new value in the REASON field and use an ACTION.

In the ACTION method, I'm not able to retrieve the data that was edited on the screen. The editable field is not persisted in any table. Is it possible to read the UI data at runtime? This REASON field does not need to be saved in any custom table because we only need it to execute the ACTION process.

Field:

The main question is whether RAP, whether UNMANAGED or MANAGED, can read data edited on the screen that does not need to be persisted in the database?

thanks

entry.title: RAP View Entity: Analytical Table with subtotals/totals in List Report (SAP Fiori Elements)
entry.content:
Hey folks,

I'm facing an issue with totals/subtotals in a Fiori Elements Object Page table and would appreciate your insights.

I'm working with a Fiori Elements List Report application using OData V4. It's based on a RAP Custom Entity (unmanaged query) and includes an Object Page with a table section (Analytical Table) that is backed by a RAP View Entity. Both the List Report and the Object Page table are exposed in the same service definition and service binding (OData V4).

The issue:
I can't get totals or subtotals to show up in the Object Page's Analytical Table. Even though I annotated the relevant fields with @Aggregation.default: #SUM, nothing appears in the UI.

Here is a simplified version of the underlying View Entity:

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Consumption View Balances'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@ObjectModel.usageType:{
    serviceQuality: #X,
    sizeCategory: #S,
    dataClass: #MIXED
}
define view entity Z_CONSUMPTION_VIEW
  as select from    I_BASE_ENTITY       as base
    left outer join I_COMMENT_ENTITY    as comment on  base.Field1 = comment.Field1
                                                  and base.Field2 = comment.Field2
                                                  and base.Field3 = comment.Field3

    left outer join I_HEADER_ENTITY     as header on  base.Field1 = header.Field1
                                                  and base.Field3 = header.Field3
{
  key base.KeyField1,
  key base.KeyField2,
      base.Currency,
      @Aggregation.default: #SUM
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'Currency'
      base.Amount1,
      @Aggregation.default: #SUM
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'Currency'
      base.Amount2,
      @Aggregation.default: #SUM
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode : 'Currency'
      base.Difference,
      comment.Text
}

Errors that I have encountered after using the entities in a Fiori Elements List Report (generated by Fiori Tools in BAS): 

- If I use the above entity, after I hit "Go" on the List Report: No data is retrieved, the developer console in the browser shows: Uncaught (in promise) Error: Cannot combine $$getKeepAliveContext and $$aggregation

some lines above it's "Aggregation not supported for this entity type" (also If I add @Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE)

- If I add "@Analytics.query:true to the view entity": FETCH API (direct DB access) is not supported for entity


I've often times read that this only achievable with RAP OData V2 - where I could indeed make it work. Although I'm looking for a way in OData v4 with RAP (afaik the Fiori Tools only work with OData v4?).

Probably you can help here, @Andre_Fischer 😉


Thanks in advance and cheers,
Max

entry.title: Custom entity, $count, $skip, $top not supported
entry.content:
Hi there,

I developed a Fiori Elements ListReport App. The data model constists of a root view entity and compositions. This works fine so far

Now I had to add an additional composition child, which is a custom entity in this case, like this

@EndUserText.label: 'CE for MfgOrdOperationStdWorkTime'

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_MFGORDOPERATIONSTDWORKTIME'
define custom entity Z_CE_MFGORDOPERATIONWORKTIME
{
  key ManufacturingOrder             : aufnr;
  key ManufacturingOrderOperation    : abap.char(4); // Operation Number (External Format)

      // Quantity-Unit Pair 1 (PP)
      @Aggregation.default           : #SUM
      @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure: 'PlanWorkCenterStdWorkQtyUnit1'
      PlanWorkCenterStdWorkQty1      : vdm_vgw01;
..
}

This custom entity has been added as association to my root view entity and it was exposed as part of service definition. Everything seems fine so far.

But it does not show any data. I analyzed the request and it always returns this error message (sorry for German) 

Angeforderter URI erlaubt folgende Systemabfrageoptionens: '$expand,$select,$format'
Which means, I'm only allowed to use $expand, $select and $format. Fiori App uses $top, $skip and $count, so the request looks like this:

.../ZC_PP_PRODUCTIONORDERPOOL(ManufacturingOrder='5230126',ManufacturingOrderOperation='0020',Sequence='0')/_WorkTime?sap-client=500&$count=true&$select=ManufacturingOrder,ManufacturingOrderOperation,PlanWorkCenterStdWorkQtyUnit1,PlanWorkCenterStdWorkQtyUnit2,StandardWorkTimeText&$skip=0&$top=10

If I enter this URL in Postman and if I remove $count, $top and $skip, data are fetched successfully. As soon as I add one of these, it fails.

Here a simplified version of my implementation

CLASS zcl_mfgordoperationstdworktime DEFINITION
  PUBLIC FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    

ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_mfgordoperationstdworktime IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
    " Result Structure Definition
    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_result_line,
            ...
           END OF ty_result_line.

    TYPES tt_result TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_result_line WITH EMPTY KEY.
    DATA lt_result            TYPE tt_result.
    DATA ls_result            LIKE LINE OF lt_result.

    DATA lv_order_by TYPE string.

    TRY.

        DATA(filters) = io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_ranges( ).
        " TODO: variable is assigned but never used (ABAP cleaner)
        DATA(requested_fields) = io_request->get_requested_elements( ).

        READ TABLE filters WITH KEY name = 'MANUFACTURINGORDER' INTO DATA(range_manufacturingorder).
        READ TABLE filters WITH KEY name = 'MANUFACTURINGORDEROPERATION' INTO DATA(range_operation).

        " Get paging properties
        DATA(lv_offset) = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
        " Get positive page size, to avoid -1
        DATA(lv_page_size) = abs( io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ) ).

        " Get sorting
        DATA(lt_sort_elements) = io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
        LOOP AT lt_sort_elements ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_sort_element>).
          lv_order_by = |{ lv_order_by }{ COND #(
                     WHEN <fs_sort_element>-descending = abap_false
                     THEN |, { <fs_sort_element>-element_name }|
                     ELSE |, { <fs_sort_element>-element_name } DESCENDING| ) }|.
        ENDLOOP.

        " Apply paging and sorting, get requested part of results
        IF lv_order_by IS INITIAL.
          lv_order_by = |MANUFACTURINGORDER|.
        ENDIF.

       select .... [here the logic takes place]


        IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested(  ).
          io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_result ) ).
        ENDIF.
        IF io_request->is_data_requested(  ).
          io_response->set_data( lt_result ).
        ENDIF.

      " --- Exception Handling ---
      CATCH cx_rap_query_provider INTO DATA(lx_rap_query).
        RAISE EXCEPTION lx_rap_query.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

As you see here, I do

- read the value of $top by io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( )
- read the value of $skip by io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( )
- check and provide total count ant the end by io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( )

Why am I not able to use $count, $top and $skip anyway?

This is a simplified version of my root view. Please note that the custom entity is used as association

define root view entity ZI_PP_PRODUCTIONORDERPOOL
  as select from           I_ManufacturingOrder

   composition [0..*] of ZI_PP_components   as _Components
  association [1..1] to Z_CE_MFGORDOPERATIONWORKTIME as _WorkTime      on  _WorkTime.ManufacturingOrder = $projection.ManufacturingOrder
                                                                        and _WorkTime.ManufacturingOrderOperation          = $projection.ManufacturingOrderOperation

{

        @search.defaultSearchElement: true
  key   I_ManufacturingOrder.ManufacturingOrder                                                    as ManufacturingOrder,

        @ObjectModel.text.element: ['OperationText']
  key   cast( _Operation.ManufacturingOrderOperation as ptrv_web_interface_vornr preserving type ) as ManufacturingOrderOperation,

...

_Components
_WorkTime

Projection View looks like this

@EndUserText.label: 'Arbeitsplatzvorratsliste Projection View'
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
@Search.searchable: true
define root view  entity ZC_PP_PRODUCTIONORDERPOOL as projection on ZI_PP_PRODUCTIONORDERPOOL {
    key ManufacturingOrder,
    key ManufacturingOrderOperation,
    key Sequence,
    ProductionOrder,
    ProductionPlant,
  
  ...
  ...  
    
    /* Associations */
    _Components : redirected to composition child ZC_PP_PRODUCTIONORDERPOOL_C,
    _WorkTime  <<-- this is my Custom entity
}

And finally, metadata extension

@Metadata.layer: #CORE
@UI.headerInfo: {
                  typeNamePlural: 'Auftragsvorgänge',
                  typeName: 'Auftragsvorgang',
                  title : { value : 'ManufacturingOrder',
                            type : #STANDARD },
                  description: { value : 'ManufacturingOrderOperation',
                                 type: #STANDARD}
                   }

@UI.lineItem: [{criticality: 'XY'}]
annotate view ZC_PP_PRODUCTIONORDERPOOL with
{

  @ui.facet: [
  // Header
       { type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
         purpose: #HEADER,
         position:10,
         label: 'Vorgang',
         targetQualifier: 'OperationDetails'
       },
       // Field Group for Material components
       {
         id : 'Components',
         label: 'Komponenten',
         purpose: #STANDARD,
         type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
         position: 10,
         targetElement: '_Components'
       },
       // Field group for Custom entity
       {
         id:'WorkTime',
         label: 'Arbeitszeit',
         purpose:#STANDARD,
         type:#LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
         position: 40,
         targetElement: '_WorkTime'
       }               
    ]


  @ui.selectionField: [{ position: 10 }]
  @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity : {name: 'I_Plant', element: 'Plant'  } }]
  ProductionPlant;

...
...
  

}

entry.title: sap public cloud BADI needed for VF02 release to accounting
entry.content:
Hi Guys, 

I looking for BAdi's for VF01 or VF02 during Acc document creation or release to accounting in SAP public cloud platform .

I tried the following BAdi but these are not triggering

FCI_BADI_INVOICING~FKK_EVENT_2612

ES_SD_BIL_EXTEND~SD_BIL_APM_SET_APP_REASON

FCI_BADI_BILLINGREQUEST~FKK_EVENT_8300

FKK_BADI_SD~FKK_EVENT_4040

the goal is to add the billing document details into a custom table when they proceed to create accounting document number.

please share your input as i am struck with this for almost 3 days.

entry.title: Production Order Quantity Update Issue in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

We are currently working on a custom development in  SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud  using  ABAP RAP model.

Requirement:
We need to update the  Total Quantity  in the Production Order (see screenshot 2), using the value from the  Total Weight  field in our custom RAP screen (screenshot 1).

📎 Attached Screenshots:
- Screenshot 1: RAP Custom Screen (shows Total Weight = 140.000)
- Screenshot 2: Production Order screen (where we want to update the quantity)

What We Tried:
We are using this CDS view:  I_ProductionOrdConfirmationTP
2. Entity:  ProductionOrderConfirmation
3. Field: ConfirmationYieldQuantity

We are triggering the confirmation logic, but the quantity does not reflect in the production order.

Expected Behavior:**
Total Weight (e.g., 140.000) should be passed to the  Total Qty  in the production order after confirmation.

Issue:
Though confirmation is working, the quantity is  not updated  in the standard production order.

Questions:
1. Are we using the right CDS and field?
2. Do we need to use a different service or BAPI for this update in the Public Cloud?
3. Any additional steps to reflect changes in the standard order screen?

Any help is appreciated!

Thanks!

I have written below code. But it is giving an error. Any idea experts.

@maheshpalavalli

entry.title: SAP public cloud uses EML to batch split the items of delivery orders

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to display the fields vertically
entry.content:
Hi there! please how can I show the fields vertically in one column under title "Description"

 

FORM f_prepare_AFFECT_DATA2.

CALL METHOD obj_test->prepare_affect_resultat2
  EXPORTING
    it_grp_nature    = gt_grp_nature
    it_description_a =  gt_affect_a2                 
  IMPORTING
    et_affect2_alv   =  gt_alv_affect2               
  .

ENDFORM.

FORM show_affect2.

  DATA: lt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat,
        ls_fieldcat TYPE lvc_s_fcat,
        ls_layout   TYPE lvc_s_layo.

  g_subscreen = '0107'.

  " Define Field Catalog
  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'REPORT_NOUVEAU'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Report Nouveau'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'RESULTAT_NET_I'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Résultat Net I'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'RESULTAT_NET_E'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Résultat Net E'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'PRELEVEMENT'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Prélèvement'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  CLEAR ls_fieldcat.
  ls_fieldcat-fieldname = 'AUTRE_PRELEVEMENT'.
  ls_fieldcat-coltext   = 'Autre Prélèvement'.
  APPEND ls_fieldcat TO lt_fieldcat.

  ls_layout-zebra = abap_true.

  " Container and Grid Initialization
  IF go_container IS NOT BOUND.

    CREATE OBJECT go_container
      EXPORTING
        container_name              = 'CC_ALV1'
      EXCEPTIONS
        cntl_error                  = 1
        cntl_system_error           = 2
        create_error                = 3
        lifetime_error              = 4
        lifetime_dynpro_dynpro_link = 5
        OTHERS                      = 6.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

  CHECK go_container IS BOUND.

  IF go_grid IS NOT BOUND.

    CREATE OBJECT go_grid
      EXPORTING
        i_parent = go_container
      EXCEPTIONS
        error_cntl_create = 1
        error_cntl_init   = 2
        error_cntl_link   = 3
        error_dp_create   = 4
        OTHERS            = 5.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                 WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
    ENDIF.

  ENDIF.

  CALL METHOD go_grid->set_table_for_first_display
    EXPORTING
      is_layout       = ls_layout
    CHANGING
      it_outtab       = gt_alv_affect2
      it_fieldcatalog = lt_fieldcat.

ENDFORM.

Normally it show like this:

But I want to show it like this:

Thank you

entry.title: RAP - Operation Augmentation
entry.content:
I am having a problem trying to get operation augmentation working for my RAP managed scenario project. This is in an on-premise system.

Root View

define root view entity ZI_OMSOPPS_PRICING
  as select from zoms_oppspricing
{
  key matnr                 as Material,
  key charg                 as Batch,
  key werks                 as Plant,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'
      kbetr                 as Price,
      konwa                 as Currency,
      validfrom             as ValidFrom,
      validto               as ValidTo,
      @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
      local_created_by      as LocalCreatedBy,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
      local_created_at      as LocalCreatedAt,
      @Semantics.user.localInstanceLastChangedBy: true
      local_last_changed_by as LocalLastChangedBy,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
      local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,
      @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
      last_changed_at       as LastChangedAt

}

Projection View

define root view entity ZC_OMSOPPS_PRICING 
  as projection on ZI_OMSOPPS_PRICING
{
  key Material,
  key Batch,
  key Plant,
  Price,
  Currency,
  ValidFrom,
  ValidTo,
  LocalLastChangedAt
  
}

Behavior Definition for Root

managed; 
define behavior for ZI_OMSOPPS_PRICING alias Pricing
persistent table zoms_oppspricing
lock master
etag master LocalLastChangedAt
{
  field ( mandatory : create )
  Material,
  Batch,
  Plant;

  field ( readonly )
  LocalCreatedAt,
  LocalCreatedBy,
  LastChangedAt,
  LocalLastChangedAt,
  LocalLastChangedBy;

  field ( readonly : update )
  Material,
  Batch,
  Plant;
  //End this section added

  create;
  update;
  delete;

Behavior Definition for Projection

projection implementation in class zbp_c_omsopps_pricing unique;
//strict ( 2 );

define behavior for ZC_OMSOPPS_PRICING alias Pricing
{
  use create (augment);
  use update;
  use delete;
}

Class with the augmentation code

METHOD augment_create.
    DATA: pricing_create TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE zi_omsopps_pricing.

    pricing_create = CORRESPONDING #( entities ).
    LOOP AT pricing_create ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<pricing>).
      <pricing>-currency = 'EUR'.
      <pricing>-%control-currency = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY AUGMENTING ENTITIES OF zi_omsopps_pricing ENTITY Pricing CREATE FROM pricing_create.

  ENDMETHOD.

So the augment_create method gets called but it never modifies my "Currency" field so Im not sure if my Entity names are incorrect or referenced incorrectly.

Thanks

entry.title: Enable selection mode in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
I developed a List Report app using Fiori Elements through RAP.

I wanted to enable the selection mode "Single" so I can single record and use a custom action to open a dialog for further processing.

I already added the table setting "selectionMode" into "Single" in the manifest.json but it doesnt reflect in the app.

When I run app and check the table's selection mode, it shows as undefined.

How can I enable the selectionMode "Single" using Fiori Elements?

entry.title: paging in RAP service - Data is getting copied from 2nd page to first page
entry.content:
May be this is minor thing which we might missing but unable to resolve -

Using RAP development created SMART tile to get details of BP.
Requirement is to have two pages based on vendor sub range for example -

 

BPVendor Sub BP1Vendor Sub BP2
ABCSBP-1SBP-2

So on First page will contain all details for Vendor SBP-1 and on second page will have all details of SBP-2 

Customer name which is referring same filed at table level (LFA1-LSTNR )  is added in both screen.

Issue is - 

On first screen customer name is getting displayed correct at first , and on second page also getting displayed for SBP-2 , but when we click on back button SBP-1 customer name is getting replaced wit SBP-2 name .
For maore details

First page 

Second page 

 

Clicking back page 2000 getting replaced with 1000

Thank in advance 
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Fiori

entry.title: How to filter a cds search help result based on a UI field?
entry.content:
@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [

{ entity:{ element: 'Version',

name: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH' } },

{ distinctValues: true, useForValidation: true },

{ additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'Aadhar',

element: 'AadharID',

usage: #FILTER }] }

 

I am using the highlighted annotation in bold to filter the cds result.

I want the result of the cds to return values of version where aadhar value

matches not all unrelated values. but it is not working. Please help.

 

regards,

Prasenjit

entry.title: Modify existing custom Fiori App
entry.content:
There is an already existing custom Fiori app using RAP deployed in the system (S4HPCE). I have a requirement to modify the UI by adding custom action. Previous developer dont have a copy of the BAS project.

My question is how can I load the project into BAS so I can modify the app and deploy?

entry.title: Custom Hierarchy in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm working on creation of Query CDS which is used in SAC/AFO for building dashboards. In this we want to Implement a Hierarchy in a particular field I have created a custom table where I have maintained the hierarch nodes accordingly.



I  want consume this hierarchy through the CDS to AFO/SAC.
I have tried using annotations in base cube like this ,


I defined the hierarchy in a cds with self association. and through annotations I imported the hierarchy on field called ZdimGrpaccnt.

Then I consumed this CDS in a Query CDS.



While consuming it in AFO the hierarchy is not enabled on the column.


Also I tried through define hierarchy Approach. It is also not working

 

While testing the hierarchy through the Class and table function, I'm getting the hierarchy as needed.

 

 


Can Somebody please suggest how to achieve hierachy in AFO/SAC in this scenerio.
please provide some detailed steps of what needs to be done.


Many Thanks in Advance,
Regards,
Arasu

entry.title: I am getting 'No data found ' error when ever i am trying to create the object in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am new to the RAP and I am using the Unmanaged scenario with Draft. When ever I tried to create the object I am getting the No data found error message even though the key field data is filled. Same scenario is working with out draft. Could anyone help me on this issue please. 

Thanks and Regards,

Prasanth.

entry.title: ABAP RAP managed scenario Default values
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have the following requirement in ABAP RAP managed scenario non-draft. I have to populate default values for few properties like currency code.

The trigger should be after clicking on the create button. like the PBO init event in classical ABAP.

I have tried to use the determination , but the code is triggerd too late, at the moment after the user clicks on the save button.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: RAP / Restful Application Programming Model: Root Create Method - How to generate lineItem facet?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

it is possible to generate multiple facets on the object page. Their corresponding fields will automatically be generated - able to be filled - when entering the create method.

Generally, when aiming to generate fields on the object page:
- UI.Facet (type: FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE) and the corresponding fields need to be annotated with UI.fieldgroup

If this is done, then the CRUD-Create-Method generated by the RAP Framework will also be able to utilize these fields, allowing the User to enter the given data.

But here is the problem: Can the same be done with lists / lineItems?
In order to generate lineItems on the object page, one would have to utilize a composition:
- In parent: UI.Facet (type: LINEITEM_REFERENCE), aswell as targetElement relating to the Composition (for example: _ChildData) and ideally targetQualifier (for example: 'X')
- In child: UI.lineItem for every relevant field including the corresponding qualifier ('X')

Doing so will generate the lineItems on the object page, but the lineItems will not be generated inside the CRUD-Create-Method by the RAP framework. Why is that? How can it be achieved?

Essentially the goal is to generate a facet for fieldGroup and multiple facets for lineItems, each of which possess their own CRUD-Create - all of this after entering the root-view CRUD-Create-Method. Can this be achieved?

Side-Note: unmanaged, no draft
The current state of the app is that only the locally annotated fieldGroup-fields appear inside the CRUD-Create-Method of the root view, but not the lineItems stemming from the compostion child. (I also noticed, that by defining the targetElement annotation inside a facet, that that facet will not generate inside the CRUD-Create-Method of the root view, but will still be generated inside the object page)

If possible, could it be that it can only be done on a specific OData Version (V2 / V4) / in specific RAP scenario (managed or unmanaged / draft or not draft)?

Thanks in advance for every answer!

Edit:
Architecture information:
- Projection_View 1: Possesses all facets (FieldGroup, LineItem) and also the fieldGroup-relevant fields (but no qualifier) - the lineItem Facet relates to the composition Child via targetElement and targetQualifier
- Projection_View 2: Possesses lineItem-relevant fields (appropiate qualifiers)
- Projection_View 2 redirected to parent Projection_View 1
- Projection_View 1 redirected to child Projection_View 2
